title: Internet vs Website
drDigitalIntro:
The internet is a giant network connecting computers worldwide.
• Think of the internet as a highway system.
• A website is one place on it, like a store on that highway.
• Google, Facebook, and YouTube are all websites you reach through the internet.

playgroundTask.goal: Visit two different websites on the internet

steps.say: The internet connects you to websites. Click the address bar, type shop.example and press Enter to visit a website.
That's one website. There are billions more! Visit another: type wikipedia.org and press Enter.

drDigitalSuccess: You just visited two websites on the internet. The internet is the network; each website is one place you travel to on it.
drDigitalHint: Click the white address bar at the top, type the address, and press Enter. You can leave off the http:// part.
